subtitle: Review recovered obligations with evidence strength, constraint hotspots, and low-confidence areas exposed.

sections.title: Validator Status
sections.label: Validation
sections.why: Show validation status for the derived artifact and approval view.

sections.title: Downstream Impact if Approved
sections.label: Impact
sections.why: Clarify what downstream design or planning may now assume.
